description:
Advances: mutagen.cli

Deliverable:
Add a runtime preamble to Mix.Tasks.Mutagen.run/1 BEFORE delegating to run/2:
  1. Mix.Task.run("loadpaths") — adds host's _build/<env>/lib/<app>/ebin to :code paths
  2. Mix.Task.run("compile") — compiles host project (no-op when already compiled)
  3. Application.ensure_all_started(:mutagen_ex) — boots MutagenEx.Application
  4. ExUnit.start(autorun: false) — starts :ex_unit application

Extract to a private helper (ensure_runtime/0) so run/1 body stays readable.

run/2 stays preamble-free — test seam stays clean per mutagen.decision.preamble_in_run1_only. README's library-entry paragraph gets a one-sentence note that callers of MutagenEx.MutationRunner.run/1 must ensure :mutagen_ex is started themselves.

Verification:
- Tests to pass:
  - mutagen.cli.v9 (mix test test/integration/downstream_adoption_test.exs --include integration) — gated by S4 landing
  - existing mix test passes with no regression
- Behaviors to demonstrate:
  - mutagen.cli.s14a — fresh-shell downstream invocation succeeds (currently aborts with module_beam_missing)
  - mutagen.cli.s14b — run/2 from inside mix test does NOT invoke the preamble

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex (owned by S2)
- lib/mutagen_ex/ast_cache.ex (owned by S3)
- test/mutagen_ex/golden/*.json (owned by S2)
- test/integration/** (owned by S4)
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex and any other phase implementations

Allowed touches:
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex (run/1 body, optional private helper)
- test/mix/tasks/mutagen_test.exs (additive — preamble idempotency unit test, default_dispatch shape regression guard)
- README.md (one-sentence library-callers note)
- .spec/specs/cli.spec.md (already updated by /distill — DO NOT re-edit unless adding missed coverage)

Out of Scope (intent):
- No changes to run/2's signature or behavior (the test seam)
- No new CLI flags (e.g. --skip-compile is explicitly out)
- No changes to MutagenEx.MutationRunner or any library-entry surface
- No new dependencies
- No refactor of unrelated mix task internals (resist the urge while you're in the file)

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly (mix compile --warnings-as-errors)
- [ ] mix test green
- [ ] Spec verification: cli.r14 stub (cli.v9) referenced but execute: false until S4 lands
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S1: Mix task entry-point setup (boot app + ExUnit + compile host)
